allow: Bash(ssh Pi4-Server "ssh-keyscan github.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null && ssh -T git@github.com 2>&1 || true")

Bash(ssh Pi4-Server "cd /srv/docker/openadr_lab && sed -i ''s|VTN/openleadr-rs/|openleadr-rs/|'' .gitignore && sed -i ''s|context: ./openleadr-rs|context: ../openleadr-rs|'' VTN/docker-compose.yml && sed -i ''s|Clone the openleadr-rs repo into this directory:|Clone the openleadr-rs repo into the project root \(one level up\):|'' VTN/docker-compose.yml && sed -i ''s|git clone https://github.com/OpenLEADR/openleadr-rs.git|cd .. \\&\\& git clone https://github.com/OpenLEADR/openleadr-rs.git|'' VTN/docker-compose.yml && echo ''patched''")
